task_updates.executor_notes: Extracted editor preferences into useEditorPreferences(timelineId), including the useEditorSettings binding, scale/scaleWidth derivation, and the three preference setters. useTimelineData now consumes the hook and re-exports ClipTab and EditorPreferences. Verified in the final batch state with `npx tsc --noEmit`.

Extracted timelineQuery and assetRegistryQuery into useTimelineQueries and removed those useQuery calls from useTimelineData. saveMutation was intentionally left in useTimelineData. Verified in the final batch state with `npx tsc --noEmit`.

Moved the derived timeline memos into useDerivedTimeline, including configSignatureRef and stableResolvedConfigRef alongside the resolvedConfig memo so the signature-based stabilization remains intact. useTimelineData now consumes the derived outputs from the hook. Verified in the final batch state with `npx tsc --noEmit`.

Extracted render state and useClientRender wiring into useRenderState, split renderResultUrl cleanup into its own effect there, and re-exported RenderStatus from useTimelineData. useTimelineData now delegates render state to the new hook. Verified in the final batch state with `npx tsc --noEmit`.

Extracted asset upload/register/invalidate helpers into useAssetOperations as a small wrapper with no dependency on save internals. reloadFromServer remains in useTimelineData. Verified in the final batch state with `npx tsc --noEmit`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed. useEditorPreferences accepts timelineId, uses the `video-editor:preferences:${timelineId}` storage key via useEditorSettings, and useTimelineData.ts re-exports ClipTab and EditorPreferences.
Confirmed. useTimelineQueries contains only the timelineQuery and assetRegistryQuery useQuery calls; saveMutation was not moved into it.
Confirmed. configSignatureRef and stableResolvedConfigRef now live inside useDerivedTimeline next to the resolvedConfig memo, and the signature-based stabilization logic was preserved.
Confirmed. useRenderState owns a dedicated renderResultUrl cleanup effect and receives resolvedConfig plus renderMetadata for the useClientRender wiring.
Confirmed. useAssetOperations is a thin asset helper hook with no save-internal coupling, and reloadFromServer was intentionally left out.
